heading: Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
label: 154709 Duty to maintain tax-exempt status
text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15470936:4015 (1st sentence)., (1st sentence), .Apr. 6, 1988Pub. L. 100–281, § 16102 Stat. 75
